summary: Route analytics JSON and text output through cmd.OutOrStdout() instead of os.Stdout in both the summary path and runGroupBy. Threaded *cobra.Command into runGroupBy so it has the writer available.
reason: Greptile P2 on PR #533. Direct os.Stdout writes bypass both test redirection (`cmd.SetOut(buf)` in unit tests) and the MCP shell-out layer that captures CLI output. Every other command in the package routes through cmd.OutOrStdout(); analytics was the lone exception.
validated_outcome: `analytics --json` output is now capturable via `cmd.SetOut(buf)` in tests and is correctly proxied through MCP; previously the writer-redirection was silently ignored.
